jaxmodel.builder

class jaxmodel.builder.NLPBuilder(var_spec: 'VariableSpec', parameter_spec: 'Optional[ParameterSpec]' = None, dtype: 'jnp.dtype' = <class 'jax.numpy.float64'>, _objective_fun: 'Optional[Callable]' = None, _constraints: 'list[ConstraintEntry]' = <factory>, _bounds: 'BoundSpec' = <factory>)[source]
